description: A remote attestation proof record containing the CID of attested content. This record lives in the attestor's repository and can be referenced via strongRef from the attested record's signatures array.

main.description: Remote attestation proof containing the CID of the content being attested.

cid.description: CID of the attested content (record without signatures field, with $sig metadata including repository DID).

note.description: Optional note explaining the attestation purpose or context.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this proof was created.
